raw_consumer_statement:
To : Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ) From : XXXX XXXX ( Cardholder ) Regarding : Dispute with Cheapflightsfares and Best Buy Credit Card Services Date : XX/XX/XXXX Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, My name is XXXX XXXX, and I am the primary cardholder of the Best Buy credit card used to purchase a XXXX XXXX XXXX for my daughter, XXXX XXXX, through the website XXXX  on XX/XX/XXXX. The booking reference number is XXXX, and the total amount charged was {$380.00}. The flight was scheduled for XX/XX/XXXX, on XXXX XXXX ( confirmation number XXXX ) from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) to XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ) with a layover in XXXX ( XXXX ). 

Unfortunately, due to an unforeseen emergency her father contracted XXXX my daughter XXXX was XXXX to travel. She contacted XXXX in advance to cancel the trip and request a credit or refund, but she was met with unresponsiveness. Multiple calls were not answered. Eventually, we had no choice but to file a dispute through Best Buy credit services because no assistance was provided by the merchant. 

After the dispute was filed, a representative from XXXX finally responded and advised canceling the dispute in order to proceed with the refund. We complied in good faith. However, after doing so, XXXX refused to issue a credit or refund and then refused to provide the required letter of dispute reversal that Best Buy needed to continue processing our claim. 

As a result, Best Buy denied the dispute, citing the lack of a reversal letter. Despite providing documentation that my daughter was a no-show and had called to cancel, both parties refused to assist us. Furthermore, we purchased travel protection insurance for {$30.00}, which also yielded no reimbursement or service despite the situation. 

This has caused undue stress and financial burden for a flight that was never taken, and for which we attempted to take proper action to cancel and seek fair resolution. We believe this conduct by XXXX and Best Buy credit card services is unfair and deceptive. We are seeking a full refund or at least a flight credit in the amount of {$380.00}, which remains unresolved to this day. 
I made multiple calls on multiple days and Ive wrote multiple emails the dates in XX/XX/XXXX, day XXXX, XXXX, XXXX Despite the fact that I started making multiple phone calls in XXXX to XXXX till XX/XX/XXXX We respectfully request your assistance in investigating this matter and holding the responsible parties accountable. Please see attached documentation including the ticket confirmation, itinerary, and cost breakdown. 

Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
